# Setup Instructions

## Prerequisites

- Node.js 20+
- Python 3.11+

## Frontend Setup

```bash
cd frontend
npm install
npm run dev
```

This will start the Vite dev server on http://localhost:5173 with API proxy to http://localhost:8000.

## Running Tests

### Frontend Setup Tests (Python - validates file structure)

```bash
pip install pytest
pytest tests/ -v
```

### Planning Validation Script

```bash
python scripts/validate_planning.py
```

## Generated Files (Do NOT commit)

The following files are generated by tooling and should not be hand-written:

- `frontend/node_modules/` — created by `npm install`
- `frontend/package-lock.json` — created by `npm install`
- `frontend/dist/` — created by `npm run build`
- `__pycache__/` — Python bytecode cache
- `.venv/` — Python virtual environment
